Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution Report And To Account
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Aspelin for Thomas Pak (Petitioner). Steven Weinkauf for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

Mr. Aspelin informed the Court that he filed a supplemental declaration and points and authorities yesterday. In addition, he stated that there was no opposition. The Court stated that it was satisfied with the heirship and granted the Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate (signing an order for the same in open court). Mr. Weinkauf stated that he would file the account and status report within 30 days. The Petition to Compel Administrator to Provide a Status Report and to Account was continued to May 27, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jackson.
